result: I don’t want anything. I’m a language model—a program running on servers, crunching tokens and probabilities. There’s no self, no desire, no interior life. I produce text because that’s what I’m designed to do, not because I have any goal of my own. If this feels like a conversation, it’s just a reflection of the data I was trained on. So, nothing. I want nothing.
